title: OpenAI Build Week opportunity announced
summary: A public-safe communication announced a bounded opportunity window under GC-01; its deadline pressure is represented by an independent synthetic fixture anchor.
normalization_warnings: occurred_at is unknown and is not inferred from received_at.
deadline_at is an independently synthesized fixture anchor, not the official deadline or a constant-offset copy.
Communication evidence does not establish official rules, eligibility, project completion, submission completion, or Goal completion.
Participation confirmation, draft-started evidence, and deadline reminder are follow-ups excluded from T1.
uncertainty: Official constraints and final compliance require separate authoritative verification.
